lesson_overview.overview: Students apply proportional reasoning to a real budget scenario over three sessions, moving from estimation to calculation to reflection.
lesson_overview.essential_question: How do you make a plan work when the numbers don't cooperate?

sequence.focus: Estimate and set up the budget
sequence.carryover: Budget planning sheet carries to Day 2

integrity_checks: Student budgets must sum to the given total — no rounding errors carry forward.
Teacher confirms calculation method before releasing to Day 3.
Makeup packet covers Days 1 and 2 estimation work.
